Blaring phonk music, flashing lights, and tons of alcohol. That was this late-night club had been thoroughly enjoying for several hours now, spending this Thursday night in the best way possible. The club was pitch black, only illuminated by flashing lights of all the strobe lights. The lights themselves had been controlled by the radio that the speakers were hooked up to in order to allow them to be flashed to the beat, allowing the large crowd to run wild with it all. That's where the star of the story had been: busting it down right in the center. Miku always was a party animal, even before joining her music group. It didn't matter how much trouble parties got her in, the Band could never stop her from doing what she loved! As her head cocked to the side to glance at the back, she saw something. Someone. Someone who caught her eyes.
